title: India’s Newest AI Unicorn!
description:
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fulldisclosure.ig/

An Indian AI startup just broke the internet. Meet Emergent: a no-code AI platform that went from launch to $15M in revenue and 1M+ users in just 90 days. They just raised a $23M Series A to fuel their explosive growth. What are your thoughts on this incredible success story?
